name: glance
title: Glance
description: CSS-only hover shine. Add the glance class to any element and a diagonal highlight sweeps across it once per hover

&::after.background: linear-gradient(var(--glance-angle, 120deg), transparent 40%, color-mix(in oklab, var(--glance-color, white) calc(var(--glance-opacity, 10%) * 0.6), transparent) 48%, color-mix(in oklab, var(--glance-color, white) var(--glance-opacity, 10%), transparent) 50%, color-mix(in oklab, var(--glance-color, white) calc(var(--glance-opacity, 10%) * 0.6), transparent) 52%, transparent 60%)
